name: arkprts
documentation:
# ArkPRTS

Arknights python wrapper.

Interacts directly with the game servers, no delays.

支持**中文和B站**账户!

<!-- Supports Chinese and BiliBili accounts -->

---

Source Code: <https://github.com/thesadru/arkprts>

---

## Installation

```sh
pip install -U arkprts
```

There are some optional requirements, you can install them all with `all`.

```sh
pip install -U arkprts[all]
```

## Usage

```py
import arkprts

async def main() -> None:
    client = arkprts.Client(assets=False)

    # search users by nickname
    users = await client.search_players("Doctor", server="en")
    print("User level: ", users[0].level)


    # =======

    # login with email or token
    auth = arkprts.YostarAuth("en")
    await auth.login_with_email_code("doctor@gmail.com")
    # or auth.login_with_token("123456", "abcdefg")
    client = arkprts.Client(auth=auth, assets=False)

    # get logged-in user data
    data = await client.get_data()
    print("Level: ", data.status.level)
```

Returned data is in the form of pydantic models, however you can also request raw json with `client.get_raw_player_info()`/`client.get_raw_data()`/... to access even untyped data.

For convenience, static game data is automatically downloaded and updated on login. You can access the static data directly or through the models. This is useful for getting names and descriptions of objects.

```py
users = await client.search_user("UserName")
operator = users[0].assist_char_list[0]  # type: arkprts.models.Character
print(f"Assist operator {operator.static.name} is level {operator.level}")
```

To disable downloading static data use `arkprts.Client(assets=False)`. To choose the data download location set `arkprts.Client(assets="/path/to/data")` (`/tmp`/`%TEMP%` is chosen by default).

ArkPRTS supports en, jp, kr, cn and bili servers. However only global/yostar servers (en, jp and kr) can be used without logging in.

### Frequent usage cases

Get all of my operators.

```py
data = await client.get_data()
for char in data.troop.chars.values():
    print(char.char_id)
```

Get my inventory.

```py
data = await client.get_data()
# normal inventory items
for item_id, count in user.inventory.items():
    if count > 0:
        print(item_id, count)
# basic items like originium or green certificates
for item_id, count in user.status.basic_item_inventory.items():
    if count > 0:
        print(item_id, count)
# consumable expirable items
for item_id, subitems in user.consumable.items():
    for item in subitems.values():
        if count > 0:
            print(item_id, item.ts, item.count)
```

Logging in with email and password to the cn server.

```py
auth = arkprts.HypergryphAuth()
await auth.login("doctor@qq.com", "wordpass12")
client = arkprts.Client(auth=auth)

await client.get_data()
```

Making a new client when a global guest client already exists; without excess overhead.

```py
public_client = arkprts.Client()

# ----
auth = arkprts.YostarAuth("en", network=public_client.network)
await auth.login_with_token("123456", "abcdefg")
private_client = arkprts.Client(auth=auth, assets=public_client.assets)
```

Programmatically getting auth tokens from a user on your website.

```py
@route("/code")
def code(request):
    auth = arkprts.YostarAuth(request.query["server"], network=...)
    await auth.send_email_code(request.query["email"])

    return "Code sent!"


@route("/login")
def login(request):
    auth = arkprts.YostarAuth(request.query["server"], network=...)
    channel_uid, yostar_token = await auth.get_token_from_email_code(request.query["email"], request.query["code"])

    return {"channel_uid": channel_uid, "yostar_token": yostar_token}
```

## Contributing

Any kind of contribution is welcome.
Please read [CONTRIBUTING.md](./CONTRIBUTING.md) for more information.

classes.name: arkprts.errors.BaseArkprtsError
documentation: Base class for all Arkprts errors.

classes.name: arkprts.errors.NotLoggedInError
documentation: Raised when a user is not logged in.

classes.name: arkprts.errors.ArkPrtsError
documentation: Raised when result code is not 0.

classes.name: arkprts.errors.GeetestError
documentation: Raised when login is flagged by geetest.

classes.name: arkprts.errors.InvalidStatusError
documentation: Raised when a response has an invalid status code.

classes.name: arkprts.errors.InvalidContentTypeError
documentation: Raised when a response has an invalid content type.

modules.name: arkprts.models.battle
documentation:
Arknights API battle models.

Any field description prefixed with IDK means it's just a guess.

class_variables.name: arkprts.models.battle.Metadata.save_time
documentation: When the battle replay was recorded.

class_variables.name: arkprts.models.battle.Metadata.level_id
documentation: Level ID in the format of Obt/Main/level_main_01-01.

class_variables.name: arkprts.models.battle.Metadata.stage_id
documentation: Stage ID in the format of main_01-01.

class_variables.name: arkprts.models.battle.Metadata.valid_killed_enemies_cnt
documentation: Amount of killed enemies that count towards the kill count.

class_variables.name: arkprts.models.battle.Character.char_inst_id
documentation: Instance ID of the character. Refer to user data.

class_variables.name: arkprts.models.battle.Character.is_assist_char
documentation: Whether the character is an assist character. Should always be false.

class_variables.name: arkprts.models.battle.Character.tmpl
documentation: Alternative operator class data. Only for Amiya.

classes.name: arkprts.models.battle.Pos
documentation: Position of the character 1,1 = bottom left (cartesian).

class_variables.name: arkprts.models.battle.Log.timestamp
documentation: Time in seconds since the battle started.

class_variables.name: arkprts.models.battle.Log.op
documentation: What the character did. 0 = deploy, 1 = retreat, 2 = skill.

class_variables.name: arkprts.models.battle.Log.direction
documentation: Direction the character is facing. 0 = up, 1 = right 2 = down, 3 = left.

class_variables.name: arkprts.models.battle.Log.pos
documentation: Position of the character 1,1 = bottom left (cartesian).

class_variables.name: arkprts.models.battle.Journal.random_seed
documentation: Random seed used in the battle.

class_variables.name: arkprts.models.battle.BattleReplay.timestamp
documentation: When the battle replay was recorded.

modules.name: arkprts.models.social
documentation:
Arknights API social models.

Any field description prefixed with IDK means it's just a guess.

class_variables.name: arkprts.models.social.Avatar.id
documentation: Avatar ID. For example a skin ID.

class_variables.name: arkprts.models.social.Skill.complete_upgrade_time
documentation: IDK. Time left until skill upgrade is complete. Is raw -1 if not upgrading.

class_variables.name: arkprts.models.social.UniEquip.hide
documentation: Whether the player may see the modules. For operators below E2.

class_variables.name: arkprts.models.social.AssistChar.crisis_record
documentation: Maximum risk this operator was used as a support in. Only for operations (before Pinch-Out). -1 if never used.

class_variables.name: arkprts.models.social.AssistChar.crisis_v2_record
documentation: Maximum risk this operator was used as a support in. Only for battleplans (after Pinch-Out). -1 if never used.

class_variables.name: arkprts.models.social.AssistChar.current_equip
documentation: ID of the currently equipped module.

class_variables.name: arkprts.models.social.AssistChar.equip
documentation: Equipped modules. Module ID to module info.

class_variables.name: arkprts.models.social.AssistChar.tmpl
documentation: Alternative operator class data. Only for Amiya.

classes.name: arkprts.models.social.PlacedMedal
documentation: A single medal on a board.

methods.name: arkprts.models.social.MedalBoardTemplate.static
documentation: Static data for this medal board.

class_variables.name: arkprts.models.social.PartialPlayer.friend_num_limit
documentation: How many friend slots are open.

class_variables.name: arkprts.models.social.PartialPlayer.server_name
documentation: Server name. Should always be Terra.

class_variables.name: arkprts.models.social.Player.main_stage_progress

class_variables.name: arkprts.models.social.Player.secretary_skin_id

class_variables.name: arkprts.models.social.Player.team_v2

class_variables.name: arkprts.models.social.Player.board

Any field description prefixed with IDK means it's just a guess.

documentation: Avatar ID. For example a skin ID.

class_variables.name: arkprts.models.data.Status.ap_limit_up_flag

class_variables.name: arkprts.models.data.Status.ap
documentation: Sanity value when last incrememnted. See current_sanity for true value.

class_variables.name: arkprts.models.data.Status.last_refresh_ts
documentation: Last time a sanity refresh was used. IDK the influence on ap calculation.

class_variables.name: arkprts.models.data.Status.last_online_ts
documentation: When the player was last online.

class_variables.name: arkprts.models.data.Status.main_stage_progress
documentation: Current main story stage ID. None if completed.

class_variables.name: arkprts.models.data.Status.server_name
documentation: Server name. Should always be Terra.

class_variables.name: arkprts.models.data.Status.friend_num_limit
documentation: How many friend slots are open.

class_variables.name: arkprts.models.data.Status.secretary_skin_id
documentation: ID of the secretary operator's skin.

class_variables.name: arkprts.models.data.Status.monthly_subscription_end_time
documentation: When the monthly subscription is ending.

class_variables.name: arkprts.models.data.Status.tip_monthly_card_expire
documentation: IDK. Seems to be close to register time, so likely the first the monthly card was used?

class_variables.name: arkprts.models.data.SquadSlot.tmpl
documentation: Alternative operator class data. Only for Amiya.

class_variables.name: arkprts.models.data.Skill.complete_upgrade_time
documentation: IDK. Time of mastery upgrade completion. Is raw -1 if not upgrading.

class_variables.name: arkprts.models.data.Character.star_mark
documentation: Whether the operator is marked as favorite.

class_variables.name: arkprts.models.data.Character.tmpl
documentation: Alternative operator class data. Only for Amiya.

class_variables.name: arkprts.models.data.Troops.cur_squad_count
documentation: Amount of squads. Should be always 4.

class_variables.name: arkprts.models.data.Troops.addon

class_variables.name: arkprts.models.data.AssistChar.tmpl
documentation: Alternative operator class data. Only for Amiya.

class_variables.name: arkprts.models.data.Social.y_crisis_ss
documentation: IDK. Crisis refers to contingency contract. Always empty string.

class_variables.name: arkprts.models.data.Social.y_crisis_v2_ss

class_variables.name: arkprts.models.data.Stage.state

class_variables.name: arkprts.models.data.Stage.no_cost_cnt

class_variables.name: arkprts.models.data.GachaNewbee.open_flag

class_variables.name: arkprts.models.data.GachaNewbee.cnt

class_variables.name: arkprts.models.data.GachaNormal.max_cnt

class_variables.name: arkprts.models.data.GachaLimit.recruited_free_char

Inventory data. Item ID to amount.

To access the static data for an item, use `client.assets.get_item(item_id)`.
User sync data. Not fully modeled.

functions.name: arkprts.models.base.parse_timestamp
documentation:
Parse an arknights timestamp and use the local timezone.

Arknights provides timestamps not with UTC but with the client's timezone.

methods.name: arkprts.models.base.BaseModel._fix_amiya
documentation: Flatten Amiya to only keep her selected form if applicable.

modules.name: arkprts.assets.base
documentation:
Assets client.

Getting assets either requires a unity bundle extractor or a 3rd party git repository.
Image assets are often universal. Game data akways needs to be downloaded for each language.

documentation: Create a new assets file based on what libraries are available.

methods.name: arkprts.assets.base.Assets.update_assets
documentation:
Update game assets.

Only gamedata for the default server is downloaded by default.

methods.name: arkprts.assets.base.Assets.get_file
documentation: Get an extracted asset file. If server is None any server is allowed with preference for default server.

methods.name: arkprts.assets.base.Assets.get_medal_group
documentation: Get a medal group. Way too specific probably.

methods.name: arkprts.assets.base.Assets.calculate_trust_level
documentation: Calculate trust level from trust points.

class_variables.name: arkprts.assets.base.Assets.loaded
documentation: Whether the data was loaded at any point during the code execution.

documentation: Get the MD5 hash of a string or bytes object.

functions.name: arkprts.automation.decrypt_battle_replay
documentation:
Decrypt a battle replay to get battle_id.

op: 0 = place, 1 = retreat, 2 = skill
direction: 0 = up, 1 = right 2 = down, 3 = left
pos: 1,1 = bottom left (cartesian)

classes.name: arkprts.automation.AutomationClient

methods.name: arkprts.automation.AutomationClient.update_player_data_delta
documentation:
Take a player data delta and update the player data.

Does not implement deleted as it is often overwritten with "modified".

methods.name: arkprts.automation.AutomationClient.request
documentation: Send an authenticated request to the arknights game server.

methods.name: arkprts.automation.AutomationClient.account_sync_data
documentation:
Sync player data.

APP behavior: Called right after login.

methods.name: arkprts.automation.AutomationClient.account_sync_status
documentation:
Sync progress status.

I have literally no idea what modules means.
I personally get 1759 after launch, 95 normally and sometimes 7.

APP behavior: Called periodically after most actions.

methods.name: arkprts.automation.AutomationClient.user_check_in
documentation:
Claim daily login rewards.

APP behavior: Called when claiming daily login rewards.

methods.name: arkprts.automation.AutomationClient.mission_auto_confirm_missions
documentation:
Claim daily or weekly mission rewards,.

type: Mission type. Either DAILY or WEEKLY.

APP behavior: Called when batch completing daily or weekly mission rewards.

methods.name: arkprts.automation.AutomationClient.building_sync
documentation:
Sync base data.

APP behavior: Called when entered the base.

methods.name: arkprts.automation.AutomationClient.building_get_assist_report
documentation:
Get base report.

APP behavior: Called when viewing base report in the control center.

methods.name: arkprts.automation.AutomationClient.building_assign_char
documentation:
Assign operators to a room.

room_slot_id: Room slot ID to assign to.
char_inst_id_list: List of operator instance IDs to assign. -1 for an empty slot.

APP behavior: Called when assigning operators to a room.

methods.name: arkprts.automation.AutomationClient.building_settle_manufacture
documentation:
Claim factory products.

room_slot_id_list: List of room slot IDs to claim.
supplement: Whether to supplement (restock) the materials back to the max.

APP behavior: Called when claiming factory products.

methods.name: arkprts.automation.AutomationClient.building_delivery_order
documentation:
Claim trading post products.

slot_id: Room slot ID to claim.
order_id: Order ID to claim.

APP behavior: Called when claiming individual trading post products.

methods.name: arkprts.automation.AutomationClient.building_delivery_batch_order
documentation:
Claim all trading post products.

slot_list: List of room slot IDs to claim.

APP behavior: Called when claiming all trading post products.

methods.name: arkprts.automation.AutomationClient.building_gain_all_intimacy
documentation:
Claim trust increase of all operators stationed in the base.

APP behavior: Called when claiming trust of all operators in the base every 12h.

methods.name: arkprts.automation.AutomationClient.building_accelerate_solution
documentation:
Accelerate a room with drones.

slot_id: Room slot ID to accelerate.
cost: Amount of drones to use.

APP behavior: Called when using drones.

methods.name: arkprts.automation.AutomationClient.building_get_clue_box
documentation:
View clues gifted to your base by your friends.

APP behavior: Called when opening the gifted clue box in the meeting room.

methods.name: arkprts.automation.AutomationClient.building_get_daily_clue
documentation:
Get a daily clue.

APP behavior: Called when claiming the daily clue in the meeting room.

methods.name: arkprts.automation.AutomationClient.building_receive_clue_to_stock
documentation:
Claim clues gifted to your base by your friends.

clues: List of clue IDs to claim.

APP behavior: Called when claiming clues from the gifted clue box.

methods.name: arkprts.automation.AutomationClient.building_put_clue_to_the_board
documentation:
Put a clue on the board or swap to the clue if there already is one.

clue_id: Clue ID to put on the board.

APP behavior: Called when putting a clue on the board.

methods.name: arkprts.automation.AutomationClient.building_take_clue_from_board

Take a clue from the board.

type: Clue type as a string. For example RHODES.

APP behavior: Called when taking a clue from the board.

methods.name: arkprts.automation.AutomationClient.building_visit_building

Visit a friend's base.

friend_id: Friend's ID.

APP behavior: Called when visiting a friend's base.

methods.name: arkprts.automation.AutomationClient.building_get_clue_friend_list

Get a list of friends able to receive clues.

APP behavior: Called when viewing the clue board in the meeting room.

methods.name: arkprts.automation.AutomationClient.building_send_clue
documentation:
Send a clue to a friend.

friend_id: Friend's ID.
clue_id: Clue ID to send.

APP behavior: Called when sending a clue to a friend.

methods.name: arkprts.automation.AutomationClient.building_start_info_share
documentation:
Start a clue exchange.

APP behavior: Called when starting a clue exchange in the meeting room after gathering all clues.

methods.name: arkprts.automation.AutomationClient.building_get_meetingroom_reward
documentation:
Get rewards from a clue exchange and such.

type: Array of booleans. No idea what they correspond to. I got [0, 1]

APP behavior: Called when entering the base.

methods.name: arkprts.automation.AutomationClient.social_get_friend_list
documentation:
Get a list of friends by ID.

APP behavior: Called after any request for friend IDs.

methods.name: arkprts.automation.AutomationClient.social_receive_social_point
documentation:
Claim daily social shop points.

APP behavior: Called when claiming the daily social shop points.

methods.name: arkprts.automation.AutomationClient.shop_get_social_good_list
documentation:
Get the social shop product list.

APP behavior: Called when entering the social shop.

methods.name: arkprts.automation.AutomationClient.shop_buy_social_good
documentation:
Buy a social shop product.

good_id: Product ID.
count: Probably amount to buy. This should always be 1.

APP behavior: Called when buying a social shop product.

methods.name: arkprts.automation.AutomationClient.gacha_sync_normal_gacha
documentation:
Sync recruitment data.

APP behavior: Called when entering the recruitment page.

methods.name: arkprts.automation.AutomationClient.gacha_refresh_tags
documentation:
Refresh recruitment tags.

slot_id: Recruitment slot ID.

APP behavior: Called when refreshing recruitment tags.

methods.name: arkprts.automation.AutomationClient.gacha_normal_gacha
documentation:
Start a recruitment.

slot_id: Recruitment slot ID.
tag_list: List of tag IDs to use.
duration: Recruitment duration in seconds.
special_tag_id: Unknown, always -1.

APP behavior: Called when starting a recruitment.

methods.name: arkprts.automation.AutomationClient.gacha_finish_normal_gacha
documentation:
Finish a recruitment.

slot_id: Recruitment slot ID.

APP behavior: Called when finishing a recruitment.

methods.name: arkprts.automation.AutomationClient.battle_get_battle_replay
documentation:
Get a replay of a stage.

Needs to be decrypted with decrypt_battle_replay.

stage_id: Stage ID.

APP behavior: Called when entering the squad selection screen with auto-deploy enabled.

methods.name: arkprts.automation.AutomationClient.battle_start
documentation:
Start a stage.

stage_id: Stage ID.
squad: List of operators to deploy. Requires charInstId, currentEquip and skillIndex.
use_practice_ticket: Whether to use a practice ticket.
is_replay: Whether auto-deploy is being used.
pry: Uknonwn, always false.
is_retro: Unknown, always false.
assist_friend: Unknown. None for no support.

APP behavior: Called when starting a stage.

methods.name: arkprts.automation.AutomationClient.battle_finish
documentation:
Finish a stage. This is where you are most likely to get banned.

stage_id: Stage ID.
complete_time: Time taken to complete the stage in seconds.
is_cheat: Encrypted battle id.
stats: Unknown, always empty dict.
data: Encrypted battle data.

APP behavior: Called when finishing a stage.

methods.name: arkprts.automation.AutomationClient.battle_sweep
documentation:
Use a proxy to instantly do a battle.

battle_type: Type of stage being done. Likely CampaignV2 (annihilation).
stage_id: Stage ID.
item_id: Item used to instantly do the battle. EXTERMINATION_AGENT.
inst_id: Item instance ID. Ideally the one that expires earlier.

Automation client. Potentially bannable.

Does not use any models.

modules.name: arkprts.client
documentation:
Arknights client.

\## Usage:
\>>> # Client for read-only public data
\>>> client = arkprts.Client()
\>>> await client.search_players("...", limit=10)
[Player(...), ...]

```pycon
>>> # Client for read-only private data
>>> auth = arkprts.YostarAuth("en")
>>> await auth.login_with_email_code("doctor@gmail.com")
>>> client = arkprts.Client(auth=auth)
>>> await client.get_data()
User(...)
```

```pycon
>>> # Client for read & write (usage is potentially bannable)
>>> auth = arkprts.YostarAuth("en")
>>> await auth.login_with_email_code("doctor@gmail.com")
>>> client = arkprts.AutomationClient(auth=auth)
>>> await client.account_sync_data()
```

functions.name: arkprts.client.search_players
documentation: Search for a player and return a model. Uses a default global client.

methods.name: arkprts.client.CoreClient.__init__
documentation:
Initialize a client.

auth: Authentication client. May be both public and private. GuestAuth by default.
assets: Assets client or path to its location.
network: Network session.
server: Default server. Not recommended for large-scale usage.

methods.name: arkprts.client.CoreClient.network
documentation: Return the network session of the client.

methods.name: arkprts.client.CoreClient.server
documentation: Return the default server of the network session.

methods.name: arkprts.client.CoreClient.request
documentation: Send an authenticated request to the arknights game server.

methods.name: arkprts.client.CoreClient.from_token
documentation: Create a client from a token.

methods.name: arkprts.client.Client._assert_private
documentation: Assert that the client is not public.

methods.name: arkprts.client.Client.get_raw_friend_info
documentation: Get detailed player info. You don't need to be friends actually.

methods.name: arkprts.client.Client.search_players
documentation: Search for a player and return a model.

modules.name: arkprts.network
documentation:
Arknights network client.

# Loading network configuration

As you likely know from the game itself, you need to get through two screens before entering the game.
The first checks the game version and network configuration.
The client and asset version must be sent along with a channel uid and access token to the game server.

| slug   | Example (en)                                                                    | Meaning                             |
| ------ | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------- |
| gs     | https://gs.arknights.global:8443                                                | Game server                         |
| as     | https://as.arknights.global                                                     | Authentication server               |
| u8     | https://as.arknights.global/u8                                                  | u8* token authentication server     |
| hu     | https://ark-us-static-online.yo-star.com/assetbundle/official                   | Game assets                         |
| hv     | https://ark-us-static-online.yo-star.com/assetbundle/official/{0}/version       | Game assets & app versions          |
| rc     | https://ak-conf.arknights.global/config/prod/official/remote_config             | Unique server config                |
| an     | https://ark-us-static-online.yo-star.com/announce/{0}/announcement.meta.json    | Announcements                       |
| prean  | https://ark-us-static-online.yo-star.com/announce/{0}/preannouncement.meta.json | Pre-announcements on the login page |
| sl     | https://www.arknights.global/terms_of_service                                   | Terms of service                    |
| of     | https://www.arknights.global                                                    | Official webpage                    |
| pkgAd  | https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.YoStarEN.Arknights            | Google play store apk               |
| pkgIOS | https://apps.apple.com/us/app/id1464872022?mt=8                                 | IOS store apk                       |

documentation: Send a request to an arbitrary endpoint.

documentation: Send a request to an arknights server.

modules.name: arkprts.auth
documentation:
Arknights authentication client.

# Authentication

Authentication allows you to get a session secret. Currently only email login is documented.

## Global (YoStar)

Global allows you to create guest accounts with only a device id.
The account however needs to bind a nickname before making any requests (after authentication).

### Get a permanent token
- Request a verification code to be sent to your email.
- Use the verification code to receive a yostar uid and token.
- Use the yostar uid and token to receive a channel uid and token

### Authenticate
- Use the channel uid and token to get an access token.
- Use the access token and channel uid to get an arknights player uid and u8 token.
- Use the arknights player uid and u8 token to get a session secret.


## CN (HyperGryph)

### Get a permanent token
- Send unhashed username and password to receive an access token.
- Optionally, send the access token to receive a channel uid.

### Authenticate
- Use the access token and channel uid to get an arknights player uid and u8 token.
- Use the arknights player uid and u8 token to get a session secret.


## Bilibili

### Get a permanent token
- Get a cipher key and hash from the bilibili api.
- Send a hashed password to receive a channel uid and access key.

### Authenticate
- Use the access key and channel uid to get an arknights player uid and u8 token.
- Use the arknights player uid and u8 token to get a session secret.


## Taiwan (Longcheng)

### Get a permanent token
Taiwan clearly has guest login and facebook / google play.
Unfortunately I have not been able to figure out how it works.

### Authenticate
- Use the channel uid and access token to get an arknights player uid and u8 token.
- Use the arknights player uid and u8 token to get a session secret.


# Making requests

Starting with getting the session secret, every request towards the game server needs to have:
- `secret` - session secret (except for the first request)
- `seqnum` - request sequence number (increments for every request, prevents concurrent requests)
- `uid` - arknights player uid

# Wrapper representation of sessions

The wrapper can represent a single or multiple sessions per client.
Single sessions are for getting personal data, but disallow concurrent requests.
Multiple sessions are for getting public data and allow concurrent requests.
